title: Whipped Ricotta Dip with Spices and Olive Oil
ingredients: Yummi Pops Nacho Jalapeño Cream for serving
instructions: Step 1. Place the ricotta cheese in a food processor or blender and process until smooth and airy.
Step 2. Add the olive oil, dried spices, salt, and pepper and process again until combined.
Step 3. Serve the dip in a bowl, finish with a drizzle of olive oil on top, and accompany with Yummi Pops Nacho Jalapeño Cream for dipping.
